Off Calendar Jul-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Zacks, 415.956.8100 of Zachs, Freeman & Patterson, PC appearing vai Zoom for Petitioner San Francisco Apartment Association.
Wayne Snodgrass, 415.554.4675, Deputy City Attorney for Respondemt City and County of San Francisco.

Hearing held. (See Reporter's Transcript for complete details) The Court rules as follows: HEARING FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is Taken Under Submission. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Sonia Rogers, CSR#8153; soniabrogers@live.com. (D501)

Hearing For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Continued To May-27-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is continued to May 27, 2022 for the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of their petition and memorandum of points and authorities in support of petition with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than May 17, 2022. (Opposition and reply received).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
